items.definition_en: Overdraft protection is a service that prevents your account from being overdrawn.
items.example_en: He signed up for overdraft protection to avoid fees.

items.definition_en: A joint account is a bank account shared by two or more people.
items.example_en: They opened a joint account after getting married.

items.definition_en: A mortgage account is used to manage a home loan with the bank.
items.example_en: The mortgage account shows how much they still owe.

items.definition_en: A mobile banking app is software that lets you manage your bank account on a phone.
items.example_en: She pays her bills using her mobile banking app.

items.definition_en: An online transfer is sending money from one bank account to another over the internet.
items.example_en: He made an online transfer to pay the rent.

items.definition_en: A fixed deposit is a bank deposit that cannot be withdrawn before a certain date.
items.example_en: She put her savings into a fixed deposit for one year.

items.definition_en: A wire transfer is a method of sending money electronically from one bank to another.
items.example_en: He used a wire transfer to send money abroad.

items.definition_en: An auto payment is a scheduled payment made automatically from your account.
items.example_en: The utility bill is always paid through auto payment.

items.definition_en: A minimum balance is the smallest amount of money required to keep an account open.
items.example_en: He needs to maintain a minimum balance to avoid fees.

items.definition_en: The account holder is the person who owns the bank account.
items.example_en: Only the account holder can close the account.

items.definition_en: A bank fee is money charged by the bank for services or transactions.
items.example_en: He was charged a bank fee for using another bank’s ATM.

items.definition_en: A joint signatory is a person who must also sign for account transactions.
items.example_en: His wife is a joint signatory on the business account.

items.definition_en: A standing order is an instruction to the bank to pay fixed amounts at regular times.
items.example_en: The rent is paid every month by a standing order.

items.definition_en: An account summary is a short report showing recent activity and balances.
items.example_en: She checked the account summary on her app.

items.definition_en: A sort code is a number that identifies a specific bank branch.
items.example_en: You need the sort code to set up a transfer.

items.definition_en: An account number is a unique number assigned to your bank account.
items.example_en: She gave her account number for the money transfer.

items.definition_en: A transaction record is a list of all activities made with your account.
items.example_en: He checked the transaction record to find the payment.

items.definition_en: A certificate of deposit is a savings certificate with a fixed interest rate and maturity date.
items.example_en: She invested in a certificate of deposit for five years.

items.definition_en: A bank draft is a payment on behalf of a payer that is guaranteed by the issuing bank.
items.example_en: He paid for the car with a bank draft.

items.definition_en: A balance inquiry is when you check how much money is in your bank account.
items.example_en: She made a balance inquiry at the ATM.
